reference: Reproduced pure TBSI baseline (single GPU, bs=48, LR=3.75e-5)
paper_reference: 56.5 SR / 70.2 PR / 66.5 NPR (4 GPU, bs=128 total)

reproduction_gap_analysis.root_cause_1: LR未缩放: paper 4GPU bs=128 LR=1e-4, 我们 1GPU bs=48 应LR=3.75e-5
reproduction_gap_analysis.root_cause_2: 单卡vs4卡 DDP梯度平均(约-0.5~0.8 SR)
reproduction_gap_analysis.root_cause_3: 16处代码改动累积效应(约-0.2~0.3 SR)

best_sprint.note: 迭代数对齐论文(7500 vs 7031)的最佳结果

baseline_bs32_lr1e4.config: bs=32, LR=1e-4, 15ep x 60k smpl (原始paper配置)
baseline_bs32_lr1e4.note: 原始paper config, 但单卡bs=32 LR未缩放导致差距-2.25
